message:
fix(core,mux): reset health tracker on pane reincarnation and fix client ID leak

PaneActivityState now tracks generation and first_seen_at to detect
pane ID reuse after destroy/recreate, resetting stale activity
baselines that could mask new-pane output. Sort observed_ids for
deterministic health snapshot ordering.

SessionHandler.SetClientId now unregisters the prior client before
registering a replacement, preventing leaked entries in the mux
client registry when sessions reconnect with new identities. Add
ScopedMux RAII guard and test verifying cleanup.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
